comment: Hand-curated corrections to the BEDCA-derived dataset. 'foods' adds staples genuinely absent from BEDCA's public data; 'overrides' replaces macros of BEDCA entries whose published values are implausible (see refs). Values per 100 g from USDA FoodData Central. Keep both lists short.

foods.ref: USDA FDC 171477 (chicken, broilers or fryers, breast, meat only, raw)
USDA FDC 171482 (turkey, breast, meat only, raw)

overrides.reason: BEDCA publishes 1.2 g fat/100 g for skin-on raw chicken breast — the fatty-acid profile of lean meat only. Chicken skin is ~1/3 fat, so the value is implausible for the labelled cut.
overrides.ref: USDA FDC 171474 (chicken, broilers or fryers, breast, meat and skin, raw)

overrides.reason: BEDCA publishes 0.99 g fat/100 g for skin-on raw turkey breast; same lean-meat-only artifact as bedca-994.
overrides.ref: USDA FDC 171093 (turkey, all classes, breast, meat and skin, raw)

overrides.reason: BEDCA's 'Garbanzo, hervido' declares 358.7 kcal — the energy of DRY chickpeas — alongside boiled-chickpea macros (Atwater ≈ 133 kcal).
overrides.ref: USDA FDC 173799 (chickpeas, mature seeds, cooked, boiled)

overrides.reason: BEDCA's 'Maíz, en mazorca, crudo' carries dry-grain values (390 kcal, 85.6 g carbs); raw corn on the cob is ~86 kcal.
BEDCA's 'Bonito, enlatado en aceite, escurrido' declares 203.6 kcal but only 4.7 g fat (Atwater ≈ 147 kcal); oil-packed drained fish runs ~8 g fat.
overrides.ref: USDA FDC 173708 (tuna, light, canned in oil, drained solids)

overrides.reason: 'Cacahuete, frito, salado' sits in BEDCA's fish group; recategorized so it appears among legumes/nuts in the equivalence tool. Macros unchanged.
'Avellana' sits in BEDCA's fruit group; recategorized to legumes/nuts. Macros unchanged.
'Piñon' sits in BEDCA's fruit group; recategorized to legumes/nuts. Macros unchanged.
